title: Retry real LLM sampling for context slimming after controller credentials are configured
objective: Now that REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_URL and REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_TOKEN have been provided, rerun the real-LLM regression sampling task for the slimmed CommunityIntegrationSkill prompt path and close the blocked_external gap.

references.description: Previous blocked result caused by missing remote controller credentials.

required_work.description: Verify that REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_URL and REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_TOKEN are now available in the execution environment before dispatch.
Use the configured remote controller path to dispatch the real-sampling work to a credentialed clean workspace.
Execute one real worker sample against the clean validation group using the slimmed prompt path.
Execute one real manager sample against the clean validation group using the slimmed prompt path.
Verify that trusted broadcast does not regress, worker evidence remains collected without directly advancing the stage, and manager-only formal signal still controls gate advancement.
Collect the prompt composition and token totals for the real worker sample and the real manager sample.
Write detailed execution logs to the main-thread log folder and publish a structured terminal result with evidence and log paths.

do_not: Do not re-implement context slimming unless the real run proves the current code path is broken.
Do not expand this task into new feature work, UI work, or unrelated workflow changes.
Do not silently stop after env preflight passes; this task is for real sampling execution.
Do not replace real-sampling verification with prompt-only proof.
acceptance: Controller environment preflight confirms REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_URL and REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_TOKEN are present.
At least one real worker sample executed.
At least one real manager sample executed.
Trusted broadcast / worker evidence / manager-only gate behavior did not regress.
A structured terminal result exists with evidence paths and a log path.

deliverables.description: Evidence folder for the retry run.
Main-thread log root for detailed logs.

working_principles: Reuse the existing slimming implementation as-is unless real evidence proves a regression.
Keep the task narrow: real sampling retry only.
If the remote controller dispatch still fails, classify the first blocker precisely and stop.
Detailed process belongs in logs; user-facing summary should stay brief.
